evals.prompt: Create a test plan for the Jira ticket MTP-17248 (https://kaltura.atlassian.net/browse/MTP-17248). Use the format from this example: https://kaltura.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/VCKB/pages/6355059124/SSO+Adapter+-+STP. Save the output to ./test-plans/
evals.expected_output: A test plan following the SSO Adapter STP format structure with sections for Introduction, Business Requirements, Related Tickets, Use Cases, Test Cases (high-level names and descriptions only), Dependencies, Professional Team, and Estimations. Three files created: .md, .docx, and .pdf in the ./test-plans/ directory.

evals.prompt: hey i need a test plan for this confluence page https://kaltura.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/VCKB/pages/6355189019/Multi+Offers+Support+-+PRD - just give me a standard STP structure with the test case names and what they test, don't go too detailed. throw it in test-plans folder
evals.expected_output: A test plan with standard STP structure containing high-level test cases derived from the Multi Offers Support PRD. Test cases should have clear names and brief descriptions (2-3 sentences) covering functional requirements, use cases, and acceptance criteria from the source. Output includes .md, .docx, and .pdf files.

evals.prompt:
Can you create a test plan for this requirement:

Requirement: User Profile Management System

The system shall allow users to:
1. Create a profile with username, email, and password
2. Edit their profile information (name, bio, avatar)
3. Change their password with current password verification
4. Delete their account (soft delete with 30-day recovery period)
5. View their activity history

Acceptance Criteria:
- AC-01: Password must be at least 8 characters with 1 uppercase, 1 number
- AC-02: Email must be unique across the system
- AC-03: Avatar upload limited to 5MB, formats: jpg, png, gif
- AC-04: Account deletion requires email confirmation
- AC-05: Deleted accounts cannot log in but data retained for 30 days

I need this in the standard test plan format with .md, .docx, and .pdf outputs.
evals.expected_output: A complete test plan derived from the text requirements with sections including Introduction, Business Requirements, Test Scenarios for each user capability, Test Cases covering all acceptance criteria (both positive and negative scenarios), and Dependencies. Test cases should include names like 'Verify password complexity validation' with descriptions explaining what is validated. Three output files in ./test-plans/.
